2070801139038302248.full_text:
🚨 AAKASH CHOPRA ON VAIBHAV SURYAVANSHI DEBUT IN 2ND T20I VS IRELAND 🚨 

Aakash Chopra said 🗣️,

"The big question will be whether Vaibhav should be played in the next match. It's a tough one. Ishan Kishan and Sanju Samson didn't score runs. No one except Abhishek Sharma scored runs. There is a clamour. It might be politically incorrect, but I would still not play him. I will still not drop Sanju Samson or Ishan Kishan. I will field the same top three and expect a different outcome, and it's par for the course. We might score 250 if we get to bat first next time. We will bat like that because we are capable of doing that." [Aakash Chopra YT]

2070782847171055904.full_text: Abhishek Sharma said: "It's just how quickly we adapt the conditions, that's really matters as a team, because when you are playing back to back games, as a group you have to step forward and get used to the conditions, whenever you get practice sessions or probably get used to, I feel as a dominating team, you have to adapt really quick and that's what we were trying today, but unfortunately it didn't happen."

2070828486382829610.full_text:
DINESH KARTHIK ON VIRAT KOHLI:

"He's in the big leagues - Michael Jordans, Novak Djokovic, Roger Federer. He's in that league. As long as you don't interfere in his process, you respect him for the person that he is with the bat & off the field, he'll create magic for you. There is no doubt about that, he's been doing that for 19 years & I don't see why he can't do it for much longer". [RCB]

2070805139473227836.full_text: Greg Chappell said: "Why have cricketers become role models? A young girl or boy picks up a cricket bat because they love the thrill of the contest, the satisfaction of a perfectly timed cover drive, or the exhilaration of rattling a batter's off stump. They do not sign up to become guardians of community morals." [Cricinfo]
